---
description: Full blueprint for adding a new bounded context domain
---

# New Domain Blueprint

> Manual reference only (no `applyTo`) вЂ” used when scaffolding a new bounded context.

## Domain Size Guidance

| Size      | When to Use                                             | Project Structure                                                                    |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Small** | Simple bounded context (few entities, minimal logic)    | Folder inside `SeventySix.Domains/` (e.g., `ApiTracking/`, `Logging/`)               |
| **Large** | Complex bounded context (many entities, services, jobs) | Separate project `SeventySix.Domains.{Name}/` (e.g., `SeventySix.Domains.Identity/`) |

**Rule**: If a domain needs >5 entities OR its own background jobs OR complex service layer в†’ separate project.

---

## Server Checklist (Large Domain вЂ” Separate Project)

```
SeventySix.Domains.{NewDomain}/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SeventySix.Domains.{NewDomain}.csproj  (refs SeventySix.Shared ONLY)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Commands/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}Command.cs           # Record
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}CommandHandler.cs     # Static class + static HandleAsync
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}RequestValidator.cs   # FluentValidation (optional)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Queries/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Get{Entity}ById/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Get{Entity}ByIdQuery.cs
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ Get{Entity}ByIdQueryHandler.cs
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Entities/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Entity}.cs                              # Implements IEntity / IAuditableEntity
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Infrastructure/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {NewDomain}DbContext.cs                  # One per bounded context
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Configurations/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Entity}Configuration.cs             # Fluent API, HasDefaultSchema
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ POCOs/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DTOs/       в†’ {Entity}Dto.cs             # Positional record
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Requests/   в†’ {Action}{Entity}Request.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Responses/  в†’ {Entity}Response.cs        # If API contract output
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Results/    в†’ {Entity}Result.cs          # If internal operation outcome
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Registration/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {NewDomain}Registration.cs               # Add{NewDomain}Domain() extension
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {NewDomain}JobSchedulerContributor.cs    # If background jobs needed
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/       в†’ {Entity}Service.cs         # Primary constructor, sealed
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Repositories/   в†’ {Entity}Repository.cs
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Settings/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {NewDomain}Settings.cs                   # Record with get/init
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {NewDomain}SettingsValidator.cs          # FluentValidation
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Constants/      в†’ {NewDomain}Constants.cs
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Exceptions/     в†’ {Entity}NotFoundException.cs  # Extends EntityNotFoundException
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Interfaces/     в†’ I{Entity}Service.cs
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Migrations/     в†’ (generated by EF Core вЂ” NEVER in Infrastructure/Migrations/)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ Extensions/     в†’ {Entity}MappingExtensions.cs  # ToDto() extension methods
```

## Server Wiring Steps

1. **Create .csproj** referencing `SeventySix.Shared` only
2. **Add project reference** in `SeventySix.Api.csproj`
3. **Add test project** `Tests/SeventySix.Domains.{NewDomain}.Tests/`
4. **Create DbContext** with schema name matching domain
5. **Create Registration** extension method: `Add{NewDomain}Domain()`
6. **Call Registration** from `SeventySix.Api/Registration/ApplicationServicesRegistration.cs`
7. **Add connection string** mapping in `appsettings.*.json`
8. **Create initial migration**: `dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate -c {NewDomain}DbContext -o {NewDomain}/Migrations`
9. **Add controller(s)** to `SeventySix.Api/Controllers/V1/`
10. **Add health check** via `AddWolverineHealthCheck<Check{NewDomain}HealthQuery>()`

## Registration Template

```csharp
public static class {NewDomain}Registration
{
	public static IServiceCollection Add{NewDomain}Domain(
		this IServiceCollection services,
		string connectionString,
		IConfiguration configuration)
	{
		services.AddDomainDbContext<{NewDomain}DbContext>(
			connectionString,
			SchemaConstants.{NewDomain});

		services.AddScoped<I{Entity}Repository, {Entity}Repository>();
		services.AddTransactionManagerFor<{NewDomain}DbContext>();
		services.AddWolverineHealthCheck<Check{NewDomain}HealthQuery>(
			SchemaConstants.{NewDomain});
		services.AddDomainValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining<{NewDomain}DbContext>();

		return services;
	}
}
```

---

## Client Checklist

```
SeventySix.Client/src/app/domains/{new-domain}/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}.model.ts              # Type alias from OpenAPI generated types
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-query-request.model.ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ index.ts                       # Barrel export
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {entity}.service.ts            # @Injectable() вЂ” NO providedIn
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pages/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-management/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-management.ts     # Page component (smart container)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-management.html
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-management.scss
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-list/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-list.ts           # Feature component
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-list.html
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ {entity}-list.scss
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ constants/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {new-domain}.constants.ts
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ testing/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {new-domain}-mock-factories.ts
в””в”Ђв”Ђ {new-domain}.routes.ts             # Exported as {NEW_DOMAIN}_ROUTES
```

## Client Wiring Steps

1. **Add path alias** in `tsconfig.json`: `"@{new-domain}/*": ["src/app/domains/{new-domain}/*"]`
2. **Create route file** exporting `{NEW_DOMAIN}_ROUTES: Routes`
3. **Add lazy route** in `app.routes.ts` with `loadChildren` + guards
4. **Register services** at route level via `providers: [...]`
5. **Regenerate OpenAPI types** if new API endpoints: `npm run generate:openapi`
6. **Add navigation** if needed (sidebar, breadcrumbs)

## Route Template

```typescript
import { Routes } from "@angular/router";
import { passwordChangeGuard, roleGuard } from "@shared/guards";
import { {Entity}Service } from "@{new-domain}/services";

export const {NEW_DOMAIN}_ROUTES: Routes =
	[
		{
			path: "",
			providers: [{Entity}Service],
			canMatch: [passwordChangeGuard(), roleGuard("Admin")],
			children: [
				{
					path: "",
					loadComponent: () =>
						import("./pages/{entity}-management/{entity}-management")
							.then(
								(module) => module.{Entity}ManagementComponent),
				},
			],
		},
	];
```

---

## Test Checklist

> **80/20 Rule**: Focus test coverage on the **20% of code that carries 80% of risk** вЂ” command handlers with business logic, validation rules, and authorization checks.

```
Tests/SeventySix.Domains.{NewDomain}.Tests/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SeventySix.Domains.{NewDomain}.Tests.csproj
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Commands/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}CommandHandlerTests.cs   # Highest priority вЂ” business logic
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Queries/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Get{Entity}ByIdQueryHandlerTests.cs      # Only if query has non-trivial logic
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Entity}ServiceTests.cs                  # Only for services with branching logic
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Validators/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Action}{Entity}RequestValidatorTests.cs  # Validation rules are high-value tests
в””в”Ђв”Ђ Builders/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ {Entity}Builder.cs                        # Fluent builder for test data
```

> See `testing-server.instructions.md` в†’ "80/20 Test Priority" for the full server-side priority list.

---

## [CRITICAL] Validation Gate

- [ ] `dotnet build` вЂ” zero warnings
- [ ] `ng build` вЂ” zero warnings
- [ ] `eslint` вЂ” zero warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` вЂ” all pass
- [ ] `npm test` вЂ” all pass
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` вЂ” all pass
- [ ] No IDE yellow squiggles in modified files
